title: rhinanthus lanceolatus
intro: Rhinanthus lanceolatus, also known as the lance-leaved roripal, is a flowering plant species in the balsam family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of promoting immune function and reducing inflammation. Rhinanthus lanceolatus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often prepared by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
